title: The Cattle Raid of Flidais
description: The warrior-goddess Flidais feeds armies from her magical cattle — a tale of divine abundance and war.
introduction: The warrior-goddess Flidais feeds armies from her magical cattle — a tale of divine abundance and war.

translation.original_text: Flidais baindia in bensid sin. Ba léi in maelgamain.
translation.text: Flidais was a goddess of the fairy women. The magical cow belonged to her.
